account_and_onboarding.getting_started: Download AnonPro, create account with email, set up username and avatar, start exploring!
first_steps: Follow some users to personalize feed
account_and_onboarding.username_rules: Usernames must be unique, 3-30 characters, alphanumeric + underscore/hyphen. Can be changed in settings.
account_and_onboarding.avatar_and_cover: Upload custom images or use default avatars. Cover image displays on profile. Images auto-optimized for mobile.

onboarding_guidance.welcome_message: Welcome to AnonPro! This is a place where you can share thoughts freely and interact with others while protecting your identity.
first_steps: Complete your profile by adding a username and avatar
Explore posts on the Home feed
Follow users whose content you enjoy
Try posting something or joining a confession room
tips: Be respectful to others in the community
Use anonymous mode if you want extra privacy
Report content that breaks community rules

quick_answers.whats_anonpro: AnonPro is an anonymous social platform where you can express yourself freely, build communities, and connect with others without judgment. Privacy first, community second.
quick_answers.is_it_really_anonymous: Yes! Your posts can be fully anonymous. Your profile stays protected and admins only access data if policy violations occur.
quick_answers.how_do_i_start: Download app, sign up with email, create username, upload avatar, and start posting or following users who interest you!
quick_answers.how_do_i_get_karma: Post and comment → Get likes from users → Earn karma points. High-quality content gets more karma!
quick_answers.can_i_delete_my_account: Yes, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Your data is permanently removed after 30 days.
quick_answers.what_if_i_get_banned: Bans happen for serious policy violations. Contact support to appeal. Bans are usually preventable by following guidelines.
quick_answers.do_admins_see_my_posts: Admins only view posts if reported by users or for platform security reasons. Your privacy is respected.
quick_answers.can_people_see_who_i_follow: Depends on your privacy settings. You can control whether followers/following lists are public or private.
quick_answers.how_do_i_earn_money: Get verified → Enable monetization → Let fans send you tips. You keep 85% of all earnings.
quick_answers.is_there_a_web_version: Yes! AnonPro is available on iOS, Android, and web. Your data syncs across all devices.

post_creation.question: How do I create a post?
answers: Tap the + button (FAB) on the home screen to open the post composer.
You can also tap the post input field at the top of your feed.
Type your message or confession in the text field.
Choose whether to post anonymously or with your username.
Add images/media if desired.
Tap 'Post' to publish your content.
Your post will instantly appear in feeds of your followers and the public timeline.

anonymous_posting.question: How do I post anonymously on AnonPro?
answers: When creating a post, toggle the 'Post Anonymously' option.
Your identity will remain completely hidden from other users.
Anonymous posts appear under the username 'Anonymous' with no profile link.
You can see your own anonymous posts in your profile, but others cannot link them to you.
Anonymous posts are perfect for confessions and sensitive topics.

messaging_someone.question: How do I send a direct message to someone?
answers: Go to your Inbox tab.
Tap the search icon to find a user.
Select the user you want to message.
Type your message in the text field.
Tap send to deliver your message.
Messages are private and end-to-end encrypted.
You can send photos, videos, and other media in DMs.

managing_followers.question: How do I manage my followers and following?
answers: Visit your Profile tab.
Tap on your follower count to see all followers.
You can remove followers by tapping the X button next to their name.
Go to the 'Following' tab to see who you're following.
Tap the X to unfollow users you no longer want to see in your feed.
You can view any user's follower list from their profile.

blocking_users.question: How do I block a user on AnonPro?
answers: Go to the user's profile you want to block.
Tap the three-dot menu (•••) in the top right.
Select 'Block User' from the menu.
The user cannot message you, see your posts, or interact with your content.
You can unblock them anytime in your Settings > Blocked Users.
Blocked users won't know they've been blocked (for their privacy too).

reporting_content.question: How do I report inappropriate content or users?
answers: Find the post, comment, or user you want to report.
Tap the three-dot menu (•••).
Select 'Report' and choose the reason (harassment, spam, explicit content, etc).
Submit your report with any additional details.
Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
Actions are taken based on community guidelines.
Your identity is kept anonymous when reporting.

editing_profile.question: How do I edit my profile and add a bio?
answers: Go to your Profile tab (bottom right).
Tap the 'Edit Profile' button.
Update your display name, username, bio, avatar, and cover image.
You can upload a new avatar or choose from presets.
Your bio can be up to 500 characters.
Tap 'Save' to confirm your changes.
Changes appear instantly to your followers.

karma_system.what_is_karma: Karma is your reputation score on AnonPro. It increases when your posts and comments get likes from other users.
karma_system.how_to_earn: Post quality content → Get likes → Earn karma → Build reputation → Get verified
karma_system.benefits: Higher karma means more visibility, trust in the community, and eligibility for verification and monetization.
karma_system.why_matters: Karma shows your contribution to the community. High-karma users are influential community members.

verification.what_is_it: Verification is a badge that proves you're a trusted, authentic community member vetted by admins.
verification.how_to_get: Build karma through good contributions, engage positively with the community, follow guidelines, apply for verification.
verification.what_you_get: Verified badge on your profile, higher visibility in searches, ability to monetize, access to exclusive features.
verification.requirements: Minimum karma threshold, good standing with no violations, genuine engagement for 30+ days.
verification.timeline: Verification requests are reviewed by admins within 5-7 business days.

streaks.what_is_it: Streaks track how many consecutive days you've engaged with AnonPro (posting, commenting, or messaging).
streaks.how_to_maintain: Engage on the platform daily - post, comment, or chat to maintain your streak.
streaks.rewards: Longer streaks build reputation and show dedication to the community.
streaks.display: Your current streak appears on your profile and encourages continued engagement.

confession_rooms.what_are_they: Thematic chat rooms where users discuss specific topics anonymously with like-minded community members.
confession_rooms.themes: Relationships, career advice, health, personal growth, hobbies, and many more.
confession_rooms.anonymity: Everyone in a confession room is anonymous - perfect for sensitive discussions.
confession_rooms.discovery: Browse trending rooms from the Confession Rooms tab based on your interests.
confession_rooms.moderation: Admins moderate to keep rooms safe and on-topic. Harassment is not tolerated.

broadcasts.what_are_they: One-to-many announcements you can send to all your followers at once.
broadcasts.use_cases: Share important updates, news, creative content, or announcements to your entire audience instantly.
broadcasts.how_to_send: Go to Broadcasts tab → Compose message/announcement → Tap Send → Delivered to all followers.
broadcasts.engagement: Broadcasts help you stay connected with followers and keep them updated.

ask_anything.how_it_works: Users can ask you anonymous questions from your profile → You answer publicly → Others see the Q&A.
ask_anything.privacy: Questions are public but protect the asker's identity if they ask anonymously.
ask_anything.why_useful: Build thought leadership, share expertise, engage community, understand what interests people.
ask_anything.control: You can enable/disable this feature in Privacy Settings if you don't want questions.

social_engagement_tips.grow_followers: Post consistently, engage with others' content, participate in confession rooms, ask interesting questions, be authentic.
social_engagement_tips.increase_visibility: Use trending hashtags in posts, engage with trending topics, ask thought-provoking questions, interact with established users.
social_engagement_tips.build_community: Comment thoughtfully, respond to questions, participate in discussions, support other members, share valuable insights.
social_engagement_tips.engagement_hack: Reply to comments on your posts within the first hour - this boosts visibility significantly.
social_engagement_tips.content_strategy: Mix personal shares, helpful tips, questions, and lighthearted content for balanced engagement.
social_engagement_tips.timing_matters: Post when your followers are most active - usually 6-9pm and noon times.
social_engagement_tips.authenticity_wins: People connect with real, genuine content more than polished or fake content. Be yourself.

privacy_and_security.is_truly_anonymous: Yes! Anonymous posts don't store IP addresses visible to users. Only admins can see metadata if needed for violations.
privacy_and_security.private_messages: DMs are encrypted end-to-end. Only you and the recipient can read messages.
privacy_and_security.data_storage: All data encrypted on secure Supabase servers. Never shared with third parties.
privacy_and_security.password_safety: Never share your password with anyone, including admins. AnonPro staff will never ask for passwords.
privacy_and_security.two_factor_auth: You can enable 2FA in security settings for extra protection on your account.
privacy_and_security.session_management: Log out from devices you don't recognize. You can view all active sessions in Settings.
privacy_and_security.privacy_settings: Control who can DM you, see your profile, and ask you questions from Privacy Settings.

monetization_guide.verified_only: Only verified users can monetize content.
monetization_guide.how_to_monetize: Get verified → Enable monetization → Accept tips/donations → Collect payments from supporters.
monetization_guide.payment_methods: Connect Stripe or PayPal to receive payments from fans.
monetization_guide.tips_system: Users can send you tips to support your content. Completely voluntary.
monetization_guide.revenue_share: You keep 85% of tips; 15% goes to platform maintenance.
monetization_guide.withdrawal: Withdraw funds to your bank account or PayPal monthly with no minimums.

problem_solving.cant_log_in: Check email and password are correct. If forgotten, use 'Forgot Password' to reset. Clear app cache if still stuck.
problem_solving.posts_not_appearing: Check if you're logged in. Ensure post saved successfully. Try refreshing feed. Check account for bans.
problem_solving.messages_not_sending: Ensure strong internet connection. Check if recipient blocked you. Retry sending.
problem_solving.slow_app: Clear cache in Settings. Restart the app. Check device storage. Update to latest version.
problem_solving.photos_not_uploading: Check photo size isn't too large. Ensure good internet. Try different format (jpg vs png).
problem_solving.notifications_not_working: Enable notifications in phone settings. Check AnonPro notification preferences. Restart app.
problem_solving.account_frozen: May indicate investigation of policy violation. Contact support for details and timeline.
